title: AAS DPP4.0 ID Link
description: Identification link for DPP4.0 — associates a physical asset identifier (QR code, serial number) with its AAS shell URI. Enables identification-link-based access as specified in the DPP4.0 architecture.

physicalId.description: The physical identifier (QR payload, serial number, batch number, etc.)

shellId.description: AAS Shell id this physical ID resolves to

shellEndpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint of the AAS Shell via the registry

registryId.description: AAS Registry where the shell is registered

resolvedAt.description: When this ID link was last resolved or generated
